1000685269.english: After tracking down the survivor's traces, we made contact with a bioroid named Janghwa. We were suddenly ambushed and engaged in combat according to procedure.
1000685269.korean: 생존자의 흔적을 추적한 끝에 장화라는 이름의 바이오로이드와 접촉. 갑작스럽게 기습을 받아 절차에 따라 교전에 돌입했습니다.

1000685270.english: During the engagement with the boots, we succeeded in defeating them with the help of Nikki Tracy from the 080 Yokohama Branch.
1000685270.korean: 장화와 교전 중 080 요코하마 지부의 니키 트레이시의 도움을 받아 장화를 격퇴하는데 성공했습니다.

1000685271.english: It seems like they hold a grudge against me.

1000685272.english: don't know. They gave reasons like, "I was ordered to kill me," "My family died because of me," "They suffered because of me," and "Because I... am guilty," but...
1000685272.korean: 모르겠습니다. ‘저를 죽이라고 명령 받았다.’, ‘저 때문에 가족이 죽었다.’, ‘저로 인해 고통받았다.’, ‘저에게… 죄가 있으니까.’ 라는 이유를 댔습니다만…

1000685273.english: Ultimately, he said he just wanted to kill me.
1000685273.korean: 최종적으로는 그냥 저를 죽이고 싶을 뿐이라고 말했습니다.

1000685275.english: It seems like there is a grudge against the Hongryeon model itself.
1000685275.korean: 홍련 모델 자체에 원한이 있는 거 같습니다.

1000685277.english: I tried to find the reason.

1000685278.english: However, the information given was too little for me to know something that even the person involved did not know.
1000685278.korean: - 그러나 당사자도 모르는 일을 내가 알기에는 주어진 정보가 너무 적었다.

1000685279.english: Fortunately, we had a new source of information.

1000685280.english: You're a real human? It's been so long since I've seen a human.

1000685281.english: - The new informant, Nikki Tracy, smiled and said as soon as she saw me.
1000685281.korean: - 새로운 정보원, 니키 트레이시는 나를 보자마자 웃으며 말했다.

1000685283.english: I was just impressed. Um... I mean...

1000685285.english: Haha. It feels really awkward using honorifics for the first time in a while.
1000685285.korean: 하하. 오랜만에 존대를 쓰려니까 영 어색하네.

1000685287.english: Can I visit secretly at night?

1000685289.english: Ah, you mean I should follow the order? Got it. I'll come see you after Shirayuri finishes her business.
1000685289.korean: 아, 순서 지키라는 말이지? 알겠어. 시라유리가 볼 일 끝난 다음에 찾아갈게.

1000685290.english: Shirayuri's silence is frightening. In many ways.

1000685292.english: I am Nikki Tracy from the 080 Organization Yokohama UOU Academy Branch.

1000685293.english: I heard the message, but I'm sorry I couldn't respond.
1000685293.korean: 통신은 들었는데 응답은 못 해서 미안해.

1000685294.english: We couldn't fix the communication equipment that broke down during the Second Coalition War. It could receive, but it couldn't send.
1000685294.korean: 2차 연합 전쟁 때 고장 난 통신장치를 못 고쳤거든. 수신은 되는데 발신은 안 돼서 말이야.

1000685295.english: That's how civil servants handle things, isn't it? Well, not that we are civil servants, though.
1000685295.korean: 공무원들 일처리가 그렇잖아? 뭐, 우리가 공무원은 아니지만 말이야.

1000685297.english: You shouldn't ask a lady her age so casually...
1000685297.korean: 숙녀의 나이는 함부로 묻는 거 아닌데…

1000685298.english: Still, if the last human asks, I have no choice but to answer.
1000685298.korean: 그래도 마지막 인간님이 물으면 답할 수밖에 없지.

1000685299.english: Yeah. I was active as a top agent until the Second Coalition War, and I've been protecting the branch since the War of Annihilation.
1000685299.korean: 응. 2차 연합전쟁까지는 특급요원으로 활약을 펼치다가 멸망 전쟁 때부터 지금까지 지부를 지켰어.

1000685300.english: What is there to call hardship?

1000685301.english: All I have to do is guard the house.

1000685302.english: And even if you protect it alone, it's not like you're living a lonely life.
1000685302.korean: 그리고 혼자 지킨다고 하더라도 혼자 외롭게 사는 것도 아니잖아.

1000685303.english: Because there are many survivors in Yokohama.

1000685304.english: Let's leave the first greeting at that. Time isn't an abundant resource for us.
1000685304.korean: 첫 인사는 그 정도로 하세요. 우리에게 시간은 넉넉한 자원이 아니니까요.

1000685305.english: Nikki. Do you know anything about the bio-android named Janghwa with whom you fought this time?
1000685305.korean: 니키. 이번에 일전을 벌인 장화라는 바이오로이드에 대해서 아는 게 있나요?

1000685306.english: Um... sorry. I don't have much information to give you. My authority isn't at the highest level, so I can't use all the equipment.
1000685306.korean: 음… 미안해. 내가 줄 수 있는 정보는 거의 없네. 내 권한이 최고등급이 아니라서 장비를 전부 쓸 수 있지는 않거든.

1000685307.english: Still, judging by what I've gathered with my own eyes and ears, it probably hasn't been long since they arrived around here.
1000685307.korean: 그래도 내 눈과 귀로 파악한 것을 말하자면 아마 이 근처에 온 지 얼마 되지는 않았을 거야.

1000685308.english: We only talked briefly, but I could tell right away that he has a total jerk. It's a miracle he's still alive.
1000685308.korean: 대화는 짧게 나눴지만 성격 지랄 맞은 건 잘 알겠더라. 지금까지 생존한 게 용하네.

1000685309.english: They probably wandered around here and there and recently ended up in Yokohama.
1000685309.korean: 아마 여기저기 떠돌아다니다가 최근에 요코하마에 흘러들어왔을 거야.

1000685310.english: And um... that's all I can find out so far, but we might be able to get related information from our branch's equipment or maybe even the database.
1000685310.korean: 그리고 음… 내가 알아낼 수 있는 건 여기까지지만 우리 지부의 장비나 어쩌면 데이터 베이스에서 관련된 정보를 얻을 수 있을지도 몰라.

1000685311.english: Doesn't Shirayuri have more authority than me?
1000685311.korean: 시라유리라면 나보다 더 권한이 많지 않아?

1000685312.english: I am sorry, but 080 is basically a branch organization. It might be different if I were an operations officer at a higher branch. Since I am an entity restored from Orca, I have no authority.
1000685312.korean: 유감이지만 080은 기본적으로 점 조직이에요. 제가 상위 지부의 공작관이었다면 모를까. 저는 오르카에서 복원된 개체이니 권한이 없어요.

1000685313.english: Still, we have the Doctor and Skadi.

1000685314.english: Those two might be able to find a way.

1000685315.english: In any case, it seems that our goal of going to UOU Academy remains unchanged.
1000685315.korean: - 어찌되었건 우리의 목적이었던 UOU학원에 가는 것은 변함이 없는 것 같다.

1000685316.english: Although we encountered an unexpected obstacle in the form of boots, considering our objective, it is right to continue the operation.
1000685316.korean: - 장화라는 예상 외의 방해요소와 마주쳤지만 우리의 목적을 생각하면 작전을 이어나가는 것이 맞다.

1000685317.english: No, I had to head further to UOU Academy to resolve the obstacle known as the boots.
1000685317.korean: - 아니, 장화라는 방해요소를 해결하기 위해서 더욱 UOU학원으로 향해야했다.

1000685318.english: Okay, leave the navigation to me.

1000685320.english: Huh? Do you have something to say?

1000685323.english: Shirayuri is very different from the Shirayuris I know.
1000685323.korean: 시라유리는 내가 알고 있는 시라유리들이랑은 많이 다르네.

1000685324.english: It's noisy. Even though they are all Shirayuri, they are all different individuals.
1000685324.korean: 시끄러워요. 같은 시라유리라고 해도 전부 다른 개체니까요.

1000685327.english: The Shirayuris I knew might have shown a different side because the situation was different.
1000685327.korean: 내가 알던 시라유리들도 상황이 다르기에 다른 모습을 보여준 걸지도.

1000685331.english: Are Draco and the Bulgasari okay?

1000685332.english: Heh heh heh. Steel Draco's shield is a contradiction in itself.
1000685332.korean: 후후후. 이 스틸 드라코 님의 방패는 모순 그 자체.

1000685334.english: This might not be the most appropriate anecdote to use now...
1000685334.korean: 지금 쓰기에 적절한 고사는 아닌 거 같지만…

1000685335.english: But it's not wrong to say we survived thanks to Draco's shield.
1000685335.korean: 드라코의 방패 덕분에 살았다는 건 틀린 말이 아니니까.

1000685337.english: Hehe, of course I just did what I had to do!
1000685337.korean: 헤헤, 당연히 내가 해야할 일을 했을 뿐이야!

1000685338.english: Come find this intel Draco anytime.

1000685341.english: Why did you suddenly attack us?

1000685342.english: No, aside from the reason, you precisely assessed our actions and set booby traps.
1000685342.korean: 아니, 이유는 둘째치고 정확하게 우리의 행동을 파악하고 부비트랩을 설치했어.

1000685343.english: Everyone survived but it wouldn't have been strange if someone had died.
1000685343.korean: 모두 무사했지만 누가 죽어도 전혀 이상하지 않았어.

1000685344.english: You could say we were careless.

1000685345.english: But disguising yourselves as civilians and suddenly attacking us is absolutely unforgivable.
1000685345.korean: 민간인으로 위장해서 갑작스럽게 우리를 공격한 건 절대로 용서 못 해.

1000685347.english: But don't forget why we're not the military but the police.
1000685347.korean: 하지만 우리가 군대가 아니라 경찰 소속인 이유는 잊지 말아줘.

1000685348.english: We exist not to kill someone but to save someone.
1000685348.korean: 우리는 누군가를 죽이기 위해서가 아니라 누군가를 구하기 위해서 존재한다는 것을.

1000685350.english: But since they did something bad, they should be punished, right?
1000685350.korean: 하지만 나쁜 짓을 했으니 혼은 나야겠지?

1000685351.english: Arresting isn't our duty, but... while we bring them in, let's give them a few swats on the butt.
1000685351.korean: 교도는 우리의 임무가 아니지만… 잡아오면서 엉덩이 몇 대 정도는 때려주자고.

1000685354.english: Alright! Make them cry and say "I'm sorry" while bawling!
1000685354.korean: 좋아! 엉엉, 울면서 ‘잘못했어요.’ 라고 말하게 해주자!

1000685355.english: When they finish crying, feed them lots of chocolate to calm them down?
1000685355.korean: 다 울면 초콜릿 잔뜩 먹여서 달래주고?

1000685356.english: Then gently tell them what they did wrong.
1000685356.korean: 그리고 조곤조곤 무슨 잘못을 했는지 알려주는 거지.

1000685357.english: If they still don't know their faults, they're hopeless villains.
1000685357.korean: 그래도 자기 잘못을 모르면 답이 없는 악당인 거고.

1000685358.english: And if they realize their faults?

1000685359.english: If they reflect properly, they'll become our friends.

1000685360.english: Let's let those kids know they did something bad to kids who could become friends.
1000685360.korean: 친구가 될 애들한테 나쁜 짓 했다는 것을 알려주자.

1000685361.english: Right. To do that, there's something we must do first, right?
1000685361.korean: 응. 그러기 위해선 우선 해야 할 일이 있잖아?

1000685362.english: Let that guy know what the Mongoose team is.
1000685362.korean: 그 녀석에게 몽구스가 어떤 팀인지 알려주는 거.

1000685363.english: Ah, we picked the wrong fight. Let's make them think that.
1000685363.korean: 아, 이거 잘못 건드렸네. 하는 생각이 들게 해주자고.

1000685365.english: Let them know that the Mongoose team... is different.

1000685367.english: It is self-evident that considering wrong to be right is no different from evil.
1000685367.korean: 그름을 옳다 여기는 것이 악과 다를 게 없다는 것은 자명.

1000685368.english: There can be no absolution for those who pursue self-righteousness without consideration.
1000685368.korean: 고찰없이 독선을 추구하는 자에게 면죄는 있을 수 없다.

1000685369.english: Even if one is born self-righteous, what meaning does that have for the victim?
1000685369.korean: 독선적으로 태어난 자라 할지라도 희생자에게는 무슨 의미가 있을까?

1000685370.english: Because there is no one left to forgive the evil deeds of the self-righteous.
1000685370.korean: 독선적인 자의 악행을 용서해줄 이는 더 이상 존재하지 않기에.

1000685371.english: Ta-da! This is Yokohama UOU Academy. The branch is inside here.
1000685371.korean: 짜잔, 여기가 요코하마 UOU학원. 지부는 여기 안에 있지.

1000685372.english: Didn't you say Yokohama is your backyard?

1000685373.english: Why were there Iron Bugs everywhere we went?
1000685373.korean: 어째서 우리가 가는 길 마다 철충이 있었던 거죠?

1000685374.english: I'm telling you, it was a safe route. I used this route when I came to pick you up, so I'm sure of it.
1000685374.korean: 안전한 루트였다니까? 나도 마중 나왔을 때 이 루트를 이용했으니까 확실해.

1000685375.english: The movements of the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) must have changed because of the battle that took place recently.
1000685375.korean: 아마 얼마 전에 전투가 벌어진 거 때문에 철충들의 움직임에 변화가 생긴 거겠지.

1000685376.english: If I had known this would happen, I should have come on a Titan.
1000685376.korean: 이럴 줄 알았으면 타이탄을 타고 올 걸 그랬어.

1000685379.english: You eliminated all the Iron Bugs blocking the way, didn't you?
1000685379.korean: 으로 앞길을 가로막는 철충들은 모두 제거했잖아요?

1000685380.english: Wait. Dr. Yang, you inserted a strange interjection in the middle, didn't you?
1000685380.korean: 잠깐. 닥터 양, 중간에 이상한 추임새 넣었죠?

1000685381.english: Huh? I just classified natural sciences.

1000685382.english: Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Earth Science, Biology…

1000685383.english: Stop joking around. Time is given equally to everyone.
1000685383.korean: 장난은 거기까지 하세요. 시간은 누구에게나 공평하게 주어지니까요.

1000685384.english: While we are goofing around like this, our forces are waiting and the enemy is getting ready, so let's move quickly.
1000685384.korean: 우리가 이렇게 시시덕거리는 동안 아군은 기다리고 적군은 준비를 하니 어서 움직이죠.

1000685385.english: Wow! Shirayuri! Coming here brings back so many memories.
1000685385.korean: 와! 시라유리! 여기 오니까 추억이 마구 떠올라.

1000685386.english: You are a restored object. That memory is not yours; it belongs to Tomo, who uploaded the memory.
1000685386.korean: 당신은 복원 개체잖아요. 그 추억은 당신의 것이 아니라 기억을 업로드한 토모의 것이에요.

1000685387.english: Still, I remember that memory. And since I don't have any other memories, wouldn't it be okay to call this my memory? And if I recall a recollection using that memory, isn't this recollection mine, just like my own memories?
1000685387.korean: 그래도 나는 그 기억을 기억하고 있잖아. 그리고 나에게 다른 기억이 없으니까 그러면 이 기억은 내 기억이라고 해도 되지 않을까? 그리고 그 기억으로 추억을 떠올리면 이 추억은 내 기억과 마찬가지로 내 것이지?

1000685389.korean: 어라? 내가 무슨 말을 하는 거지?

1000685390.english: Where is the branch entrance, Nikki?

1000685392.english: Ah, but don't go in too deep.
1000685392.korean: 아, 하지만 너무 깊숙이 들어가지는 마.

1000685393.english: If someone who has not been authorized approaches, the security system will activate.
1000685393.korean: 허가를 받지 않은 자가 접근하면 경비장치가 작동하니까.

1000685394.english: Then what's with the AGS wreckage over there? Was there an intrusion?
1000685394.korean: 그러면 저기 있는 AGS 잔해는 뭐죠? 침입이 있었나요?

1000685395.english: Haha, my security clearance isn’t high either. I just went a bit further in my drunken state… Even though I said we were on the same side, they just wouldn’t believe me.
1000685395.korean: 하하, 나도 보안 등급이 높지는 않거든. 술김에 조금 더 들어갔을 뿐인데… 아무리 아군이라고 말해도 안 믿어주더란 말이지.

1000685396.english: Families living under the same roof aren't supposed to act like this.
1000685396.korean: 한 지붕 아래에 사는 가족끼리 이러는 거 아닌데.

1000685397.english: Just living under the same roof doesn't make you family.
1000685397.korean: 한 지붕 아래 산다고 다 가족은 아니죠.

1000685398.english: Doctor? Miss Skadi? Can you unlock the security?
1000685398.korean: 닥터? 스카디 양? 보안을 해제할 수 있겠나요?

1000685401.english: It’s not much different from the old days. I suppose that’s to be expected since there’s no one to update it.
1000685401.korean: 옛날이랑 크게 다를 게 없네. 업데이트 할 사람이 없으니 당연한 일이겠지만.

1000685402.english: I will skip the explanation regarding the computer-related aspects because we are short on time and few people will likely understand them. The current issue is a structure where the physical connection is severed if a hacking attempt is made from the auxiliary system to the main system.
1000685402.korean: 전산적인 건 시간도 부족하고 이해할 사람이 적을 테니 설명은 생략. 지금 문제 되는 건 보조 시스템에서 주 시스템으로 해킹을 시도할 시 물리적으로 연결이 끊기는 구조야.

1000685403.english: If you make even the slightest mistake, the connection will be severed, enhancing security, and there is a risk that your data could be deleted.
1000685403.korean: 만에 하나 실수하면 연결이 끊기면서 보안이 강화되고 자칫하면 자료가 삭제될 수 있어.

1000685404.english: If we had enough time, we could complete it safely, but we don't have enough time, do we?
1000685404.korean: 충분한 시간이 있다면 안전하게 완료할 수 있겠지만 우리에게는 시간이 부족하잖아요?

1000685405.english: But it’s not like there isn’t a way.

1000685406.english: Bypassing security and forcibly accessing the internal terminal to hack
1000685406.korean: 경비를 뚫고 강제적으로 심부의 단말기에 접속해서 해킹

1000685407.english: If you do that, it might be a little risky, but you will be able to achieve your goal.
1000685407.korean: 을 하면 조금은 위험하겠지만 목적을 달성할 수 있을 거예요.

1000685408.english: … … Dr. Yang? You just added a weird interjection again, didn't you?

1000685409.english: Huh? No, no. I was thinking about the types of degrees our lab can award.
1000685409.korean: 응? 아냐아냐. 우리 연구실에서 수여할 수 있는 학위 종류를 생각하고 있었어.

1000685410.english: Physics, mathematics, statistics, mechanical engineering, chemistry…

1000685412.english: There might be other methods if we looked further, but this is the most appropriate for our current situation.
1000685412.korean: 찾으면 더 있겠지만 지금 우리 상황에서는 이 방법이 가장 적절해요.

1000685414.english: I intend to obtain information using aggressive methods. Would you grant me permission?
1000685414.korean: 강경한 방법으로 정보를 획득하려고 하는데 허가해 주시겠어요?

1000685415.english: Is it okay to interpret the level of caution at the spot?
1000685415.korean: 조심의 정도는 현장에서 자의로 해석해도 되지?

1000685416.english: Good. Now that the approval has been granted.

1000685417.english: Shall we take a look at what information our branch was hiding?
1000685417.korean: 우리 지부는 어떤 정보를 숨기고 있었는지 볼까?

1000685418.english: Since they smashed up the security AGS like that, this branch should be shut down.
1000685418.korean: 경비 AGS를 이렇게 박살 냈으니 이 지부는 폐쇄해야겠네.

1000685419.english: Not sure you're the one to say that, given how much you smashed.
1000685419.korean: 제일 많이 박살낸 사람이 할 말은 아닌 거 같은데…

1000685420.english: Hahahaha! As long as the result is good, everything's OK!

1000685421.english: Hahahahaha... was that a bit much?

1000685422.english: Doctor, Miss Skadi? Results of the hack?

1000685423.english: Who do you think we are?

1000685425.english: Decrypting the communications sent from North America with the decryption program...
1000685425.korean: 해독 프로그램으로 북미에서 발신한 통신을 해독하고…

1000685426.english: I'll look up information on the Bioroid called Boots.

1000685428.english: I've done analyst work plenty of times.

1000685429.english: - While the landing force secures the route to the UOU academy, the vanguard that headed to the UOU academy reported success hacking the database.
1000685429.korean: - 상륙부대가 UOU학원까지 가는 길의 안전을 확보하는 동안, 선두로 UOU학원으로 향했던 부대가 데이터 베이스를 해킹하는데 성공했다는 보고가 들어왔다.

1000685430.english: - Not long after, Shirayuri compiled and reported information on Boots.
1000685430.korean: - 그리고 오래지 않아 장화에 대한 정보를 시라유리가 정리해서 보고했다.

1000685431.english: To understand the Bioroid called Boots, you first need to know about a person named Maria Leoboros.
1000685431.korean: 장화라는 바이오로이드에 대해서 이해하기 위해서는 우선 마리아 리오보로스라는 사람에 대해서 알아야해요.

1000685433.english: She led the anti-Angel faction within Black River.

1000685434.english: Angel Leoboros used many methods in her business that made enemies easily.
1000685434.korean: 앙헬 리오보로스는 자신의 사업에서 적을 만들기 쉬운 방법을 많이 이용했거든요.

1000685435.english: When Maria's husband Nicholas Rodriguez interfered with Angel's business, he 'accidentally died.'
1000685435.korean: 마리아의 남편 니콜라스 로드리게스가 앙헬의 사업에 방해가 되자 그는 ‘사고사’를 당하고 말죠.

1000685436.english: After her husband died, Maria proved she was a Leoboros.
1000685436.korean: 마리아는 남편이 죽자 자신도 리오보로스라는 것을 증명했어요.

1000685437.english: She turned the elders who tried to use her to her advantage, absorbed them, and became the focal point of the anti-Angel faction.
1000685437.korean: 자신을 이용하려는 장로들을 역으로 이용하고 흡수해서 스스로 반앙헬파의 구심점이 되었죠.

1000685438.english: She used Bioroids to conduct operations against Angel, and later proclaimed herself Empress.
1000685438.korean: 그리고 바이오로이드를 이용해서 앙헬을 향한 공작을 펼치고, 나중에는 스스로 여제라고 칭했죠.

1000685439.english: Boots is a Bioroid Maria created to carry out terrorism.
1000685439.korean: 장화는 마리아가 테러를 일으키기 위해 만든 바이오로이드에요.

1000685440.english: She carried out terror attacks on facilities and figures related to Angel...

1000685443.english: Analysis of the genetic similarity between JangHwa and HongRyeon and analysis of JangHwa's genetic sample left at the scene indicate that JangHwa and HongRyeon are genetically significantly related.
1000685443.korean: 장화와 홍련의 외향적 유사함과 현장에 남은 장화의 유전자 샘플을 분석한 결과. 장화와 홍련은 유전적으로 유의미한 연관성이 있다고 하네요.

1000685444.english: Considering that the Mongoose team led by HongRyeon was adopted as an anti-terror unit earlier than JangHwa's appearance...
1000685444.korean: 홍련을 위시한 몽구스 팀이 대테러부대로 채택된 시기가 장화의 등장시기보다 앞선 것을 생각하면…

1000685445.english: It is highly likely that JangHwa was created based on HongRyeon's genetic information.
1000685445.korean: 장화는 홍련의 유전 정보를 기반으로 만들어졌을 확률이 높다고 하네요.

1000685446.english: Perhaps it's a form of species-hatred?

1000685447.english: - In addition, Shirayuri also reported on JangHwa's behavioral patterns.
1000685447.korean: - 이 외에도 시라유리는 장화의 행동양식 같은 것도 보고했다.

1000685448.english: - While listening to the report some suspicions were resolved, but new suspicions also arose.
1000685448.korean: - 보고를 들으면서 해소되는 의혹도 있었지만 새로 생기는 의혹도 있었다.

1000685451.english: You mean you can't understand why Angel knew about Maria Leoboros and JangHwa and yet left them alone.
1000685451.korean: 앙헬이 마리아 리오보로스와 장화에 대해서 알고 있었으면서 왜 그냥 뒀는지 이해가 안 간다는 말씀이시네요.

1000685452.english: What do you think, Commander, why would she have left them alone?
1000685452.korean: 사령관님 생각에는 어째서 그냥 둔 거 같나요?

1000685453.english: - Because they were family? Out of guilt? Because Maria's ability was outstanding? Because of her image?
1000685453.korean: - 가족이라서? 죄책감을 느껴서? 마리아의 능력이 뛰어나서? 자신의 이미지 때문에?

1000685454.english: - But considering the course of action of Angel that we've come to know indirectly...
1000685454.korean: - 하지만 간접적으로나마 접한 앙헬이라는 인물의 행보를 생각하면…

1000685456.english: She would have gathered her opponents under Maria and dealt with them at once.
1000685456.korean: 마리아 밑에 자신의 반대자들을 결집시키고 한 번에 처리하려고 했겠죠.

1000685458.english: But the reports related to JangHwa included an order to restrict JangHwa's activities but not to execute her.
1000685458.korean: 하지만 장화와 관련된 보고서에는 장화의 활동을 제한하되 사살하지 말라는 명령서가 첨부되어 있었어요.

1000685459.english: The order probably didn't reach field agents, so we didn't know, but the higher-ups must have known.
1000685459.korean: 명령서가 현장 요원까지는 내려오지는 않아 우리는 몰랐지만 간부들은 알고 있었겠죠.

1000685460.english: Given Black River's military strength, execution would not have been difficult.
1000685460.korean: 블랙리버의 군사력을 생각하면 사살은 어렵지 않았을 거예요.

1000685461.english: They could have overwhelmed her with a mass operation.

1000685462.english: They could also have lured her to a low-priority area like the slums and detonated a bomb.
1000685462.korean: 빈민가처럼 중요도가 떨어지는 장소로 유인한 후에 폭탄을 터트리는 방법도 가능하죠.

1000685463.english: - A callous way to treat lives, but plausible as an old-era plan.
1000685463.korean: - 인명을 경시하는 방법이지만 옛 시대에 실제로 구상된 작전이겠지.

1000685464.english: That's it for the verbal report.

1000685465.english: I'll upload the written report to the network as soon as it's organized.
1000685465.korean: 서면 보고는 정리되는 대로 네트워크에 올릴게요.

1000685467.english: It is self-evident that there is no good in following evil on the grounds that one must obey.
1000685467.korean: 복종해야한다는 이유로 악을 따르는 것에 선이 없는 것은 자명.

1000685468.english: There can be no exemption for those who knowingly obey evil and commit evil.
1000685468.korean: 알면서도 악에 복종하여 악을 행하는 자에게 면죄는 있을 수 없다.

1000685469.english: Even if one is obedient from birth, what meaning does that have for the victim?
1000685469.korean: 날 때부터 복종하는 자라 할지라도 희생자에게는 무슨 의미가 있을까?

1000685470.english: Because there is no longer anyone to forgive the evil deeds of the one who obeyed.
1000685470.korean: 복종한 자의 악행을 용서해줄 이는 더 이상 존재하지 않기에.

1000685471.english: A written report regarding Janghwa was submitted, and a meeting to discuss countermeasures for her was held.
1000685471.korean: - 장화에 대한 서면 보고가 올라오고 그녀에 대한 대책 회의가 열렸다.

1000685472.english: A bioroid that is clearly hostile to the Orca members.

1000685473.english: So even if we try to ignore them, there is a high probability that they will attack us first.
1000685473.korean: 그러니 무시하려고 해도 그쪽에서 먼저 우리를 공격할 가능성이 높소.

1000685474.english: Also, attempting to capture them alive could result in casualties. In this situation, shooting them is also an option.
1000685474.korean: 그리고 무리하게 생포를 시도했다가 사상자가 발생할 수도 있소. 이런 상황이라면 사살하는 것도 방도요.

1000685475.english: - The dragon calmly presented his opinion.

1000685476.english: The members born for military use expressed their approval of the dragon's opinion in various ways.
1000685476.korean: - 군용으로 태어난 대원들은 용의 의견에 여러 방식으로 긍정의 뜻을 내비쳤다.

1000685477.english: - In an atmosphere where the decision would be to shoot to death if there were no objections.
1000685477.korean: - 반대가 없다면 사살로 결정될 분위기 속에서.

1000685480.english: The goal roamed the world for a long time even after the extinction of humanity.
1000685480.korean: 목표는 인류 멸망 후에도 오랫동안 세계를 누볐습니다.

1000685481.english: Her experience is highly likely to be of great help to us and can serve as a stepping stone to recruit other bioroids from the group she belonged to.
1000685481.korean: 그녀의 경험은 우리에게 큰 도움이 될 가능성이 높고 그녀가 속했던 집단의 다른 바이오로이드를 포섭할 디딤돌이 될 수 있습니다.

1000685482.english: Also, killing the target when they could have been captured alive could negatively affect the morale of the other team members.
1000685482.korean: 그리고 충분히 생포할 수 있는 상황에서 목표를 사살하는 것은 다른 대원들의 사기에 악영향을 끼칠 수도 있을 겁니다.

1000685483.english: Then who will capture them alive?

1000685484.english: I request that the Mongoose team be deployed.

1000685486.english: No. We are requesting their deployment because it is something the Mongoose team naturally has to do and is capable of doing.
1000685486.korean: 아뇨. 몽구스 팀이 당연히 해야 하고 할 수 있는 일이기에 투입을 요청하는 겁니다.

1000685487.english: Can you take responsibility if there are casualties?
1000685487.korean: 사상자가 생겼을 때 책임질 수 있소?

1000685488.english: I am the operations officer. I exist to command operations and take responsibility for the results.
1000685488.korean: 저는 작전관입니다. 작전을 지휘하고 작전 결과를 책임지기 위해 존재합니다.

1000685490.english: The dragon looked at Hongryeon and nodded.

1000685491.english: And the team members looked at me.

1000685492.english: If my opinion aligns with that of the team members, there is no reason to object.
1000685492.korean: - 대원들과 나의 의견이 일치하면 반대할 이유가 없다.

1000685496.english: First of all, active support from 080 is needed for this operation.
1000685496.korean: 우선 이번 작전에서는 080의 적극적인 지원이 필요합니다.

1000685497.english: What kind of support is needed?

1000685499.english: I am an explosive ordnance disposal agent from Unit 080.

1000685500.english: Are you keeping in mind that Janghwa blew up the building?
1000685500.korean: 장화가 건물을 폭파했던 것을 염두하고 있군요?

1000685501.english: Because even if we capture Janghwa alive, everything becomes meaningless if she self-destructs at the end.
1000685501.korean: 장화를 생포해도 마지막에 자폭하면 모든 것이 무의미해지니까요.

1000685502.english: But right now, Orca doesn't have Ellie's genetic seed.
1000685502.korean: 하지만 지금 오르카에는 엘리의 유전자 씨앗이 없어요.

1000685505.english: It might be at UOU Academy.

1000685506.english: The place where the database is located.

1000685507.english: The supply warehouse and the database have separate security systems.
1000685507.korean: 물자 창고와 데이터 베이스는 보안 시스템이 분리 되어 있어요.

1000685508.english: It wouldn't be a problem for internal personnel with security clearance on both sides, but it is incredibly annoying for external personnel.
1000685508.korean: 양쪽에 대한 보안 인가가 난 내부 인원이라면 문제가 없겠지만 외부 인원에게는 귀찮기 그지 없죠.

1000685509.english: - When it comes to annoying things.

1000685510.english: We selected personnel to secure the 080 Branch supply warehouse and planned an operation to capture Janghwa under the leadership of Hongryeon.
1000685510.korean: - 우리는 080 지부 물자 창고를 확보할 인원을 선별하고 홍련의 주도하에 장화를 생포할 작전을 계획했다.

1000685512.english: I'm Eli Quickhand, an explosive ordnance disposal operative from the 080 Agency.
1000685512.korean: 080기관의 폭발물 처리 요원 엘리 퀵핸드라고 합니다.

1000685513.english: I will serve wholeheartedly according to my duty.

1000685514.korean: - 엘리 퀵핸드는 예의 바르게 인사를 했다.

1000685515.english: - Her youthful and somewhat naive-looking appearance felt slightly awkward to me, who is used to Bioroids with guileless appearances.
1000685515.korean: - 겉모습이 어리고 천방… 천진난만한 바이오로이드에게 익숙한 나에게는 살짝 어색하게 느껴졌다.

1000685516.english: Eli, you've heard about the situation, right?

1000685517.english: Yes, Shirayuri... I heard we're dealing with a Bioroid who specializes in explosives.
1000685517.korean: 네, 시라유리… 폭발물을 전문적으로 다루는 바이오로이드를 상대해야 한다고 들었어요.

1000685518.english: It's my specialty, so leave it to me.

1000685520.english: Don't be too nervous. The other operatives and older brothers here are all good people.
1000685520.korean: 너무 긴장하지는 마. 다른 대원들이랑 오빠 전부 좋은 사람들 밖에 없으니까.
